children.text: Every binding on this page uses { js: "..." } and every workflow uses runJavaScript. Open the right panel on any element to see the WeWeb-style identifiers — variables.cartCount, collections.products.data, context.item.field — that JS mode emits.

text.js:
const c = variables.cartCount ?? 0;
return c > 0 ? `${c} item(s) in cart` : 'Cart is empty';

const url = variables.jsB64Url ?? '';
